data.title: USD1 Stablecoin Blasts 1,540% to $2.1B – Will Trump-Tied Token Keep Its Peg?
data.description:
USD1 has grown from $128 m to more than $2. 1 bn within days, driven by sizeable BNB-Chain mints and MGX’s agreement to use the token for a $2 bn Binance investment. Backed by WLFI, the dollar-pegged coin now ranks seventh by market cap, has drawn investors across Europe, Asia and Latin America, and has been listed fee-free on HTX. The post USD1 Stablecoin Blasts 1,540% to $2
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/usd1-blasts-1540-to-2-1b-trump-tied-stablecoin/

data.title: Bill Gates announces he will donate most of his wealth to the Gates Foundation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Microsoft founder Bill Gates announced on the 8th that he would donate most of his personal wealth to the Gates Foundation and set a goal of more than $200 billion in charitable spending before the foundation ceases operations in 2045 to support people in need around the world. He said that the Gates Foundation's charitable spending is expected to exceed $200 billion from now to 2045, including the size of the foundation's existing endowment fund and his future donations. According to a statement released by the Gates Foundation, the foundation's overall strategy for the next 20 years will remain unchanged. It will work closely with partners to do its utmost to promote three core goals, namely, to help end maternal and infant deaths from preventable diseases; to ensure that the next generation is no longer threatened by deadly infectious diseases; and to help hundreds of millions of people escape poverty and embark on the road to prosperity.

data.title: India asked X to block more than 8,000 accounts in India, but X disagreed with the Indian government's request.
data.description: Social Media Platform "X": Has received an administrative order from the Government of India requiring X to block over 8,000 accounts in India. The order includes a request to block access to accounts belonging to international news organizations and prominent X users in India. Disagree with the Indian Government's request. Exploring all possible legal avenues for the Company.

data.title: Bitcoin options could pave the path for new BTC price highs — Here is how
data.description:
Key takeaways:97% of the $8. 3 billion in Bitcoin put options expire worthless at a $102,000 BTC price. Short covering above $105,000 could trigger a Bitcoin price rally to new highs. Bitcoin (BTC) soared above $101,000 on May 8, reaching its highest level in over three months
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-options-could-pave-the-path-for-new-btc-price-highs-here-is-how?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
